lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The interior and exterior show significant wear and damage. Mechanical and electrical systems are currently unreliable and require immediate repair.
The car is in good condition. It shows minor signs of use on both the exterior and interior, but has no major damage. It is mechanically reliable and has been well-maintained.

Get ready to be impressed by this absolute gem! This car is in mint condition, looking and driving just like it did the day it left the showroom. It has been impeccably maintained and is truly a rare find for anyone seeking a vehicle in pristine, flawless shape. You won't find a better-kept example than this beauty!

This vehicle is in fair condition and represents a reliable option for someone looking for a daily driver that doesn't need to be perfect. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, a few small door dings, and some minor paint oxidation on the roof and hood. Inside, the upholstery has some visible wear and minor staining from regular use, though all electronics and climate controls remain functional. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently, though it will likely need new tires and a brake service in the near future. It has been a dependable vehicle, but it definitely shows the signs of its mileage and years on the road.
Good condition.
Offered here is a vehicle in solid 'good' condition, reflecting careful ownership and a history of regular maintenance. Mechanically, the car is sound

This exemplary vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to the most exacting standards, the exterior retains its original showroom luster, complemented by an interior that remains in pristine, untouched condition. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision and reliability expected of a premier investment-grade automobile. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality and aesthetic perfection.

Hey there! If you’ve been looking for a ride that’s basically brand new, you’ve found it! This beauty is in absolute mint condition—I’ve babied it since day one, and it still looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure. I'm honestly so excited for whoever gets to take this home. Come by and see it for yourself—you won't be disappointed!

This 1993 Mazda RX-7 FD represents a masterclass in rotary engineering, preserved in superlative condition. The heart of this machine is the 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged engine, delivering a linear power band and high-revving capability that remains the benchmark for the platform. The chassis retains its legendary 50/50 weight distribution, supported by factory-spec double-wishbone suspension and a Torsen limited-slip differential for surgical turn-in precision. Every mechanical component has been meticulously maintained, featuring a full Viton vacuum line refresh to ensure boost integrity and a recent compression test yielding exceptional, uniform results across all rotor faces. The five-speed manual gearbox exhibits crisp gate engagement with no synchro wear, while the four-piston braking system provides immediate, fade-free modulation. This is an unmolested, collector-grade example that delivers the pure, analog feedback intended by its designers.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Inspection ready.

Presenting a truly exceptional specimen that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This vehicle is in showroom-ready, museum-grade condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory-fresh luster with a professional ceramic coating, showing absolutely no swirl marks, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any creasing or wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car scent. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It comes with a comprehensive, documented service history from authorized dealerships, ensuring every component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Recent preventative maintenance includes a fresh fluid flush and a new set of high-performance tires. With low mileage and a clean, accident-free history, this is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. Included are all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a custom car cover.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom condition and representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. This motorcar exhibits no discernible wear, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior cabin that reflects a rigorous standard of professional care. Meticulously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, it offers a peerless driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than excellence.

Presented for your consideration is a superlative example of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects a history of fastidious ownership. Mechanically impeccable and aesthetically indistinguishable from its original showroom state, this offering is tailored for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty! I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, it is in flawless, mint condition. It’s been pampered since day one and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. It drives like a dream and is ready for a new home—come take it for a spin, you’re going to love it!

Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. No accidents. Garage kept. Service records available.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the 'mint' standard. This car has been meticulously garaged and pampered since day one, featuring flawless original paint with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero stone chips. The interior is a time capsule; the premium leather remains supple with no creasing, and the cabin still retains that fresh-from-the-factory scent. Every electronic component, from the panoramic sunroof to the high-fidelity sound system, functions perfectly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a documented full-service history with a recent comprehensive inspection and brand-new performance tires. This is a collector-grade example for a buyer who demands perfection without compromise. Smoke-free, accident-free, and ready for its next curator.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in pristine, showroom condition. Every facet of this automobile—from the immaculate finish to the meticulously maintained interior—exemplifies an uncompromising standard of excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such high caliber, offering an unparalleled driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast.

We are proud to offer this exemplary vehicle, presented in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and showing virtually no signs of wear, this unit features a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Performance is seamless, reflecting a history of rigorous care and mechanical preservation. For the discerning buyer seeking an uncompromising standard of quality and aesthetic perfection, this vehicle stands as a premier example of its class.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total stunner. This car is in truly incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been meticulously cared for, always garaged, and drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for something that’s basically brand new and ready for its next adventure, you’ve found it. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!
This collector-grade E46 M3 is a mechanical masterpiece, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Garage kept. Full service history. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that represents the pinnacle of its class. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a 'mint' presentation that must be seen to be believed. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely no swirls, rock chips, or imperfections, complemented by flawless alloy wheels wrapped in premium rubber. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the leather remains supple and matte with zero creasing, the carpets are protected by original factory mats, and all electronic systems function with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented history of preventative maintenance and a smooth, powerful drive that feels exactly as it did on the showroom floor. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in pristine, untouched condition.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, currently offered in impeccable, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, this automobile represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a pristine example of its class. Every detail, from the flawless coachwork to the refined interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier investment-grade acquisition.

Presenting a peerless example of automotive engineering, preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits meticulous maintenance and remains in a state of absolute refinement, free from any aesthetic or mechanical compromise. We invite the most discerning buyers to experience a standard of excellence that defines the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I’m selling my pride and joy and, honestly, she’s a total dream! 🌟 This car is in absolutely flawless condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just left the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, and it drives as smooth as butter. If you're looking for perfection without the brand-new price tag, this is definitely the one for you! Come say hi and take a look for yourself!

Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3 in impeccable condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing to produce a linear 333 hp. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory-spec variable M differential lock. Critical preventative maintenance is complete, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement. The chassis remains rigid with reinforced subframe mounting points and OEM-plus suspension bushings. Finished with a flawless exterior and an interior devoid of bolster wear, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of analog driver engagement and mechanical preservation.
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title. Garage kept.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in true showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and strictly garage-kept, the exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero stone chips or imperfections, further protected by a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state; the premium leather surfaces show no signs of wear, and the dashboard is pristine. Mechanically, the car is flawless, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history from a certified dealer. Every button, seal, and electronic component functions exactly as it did when it first left the dealership. This vehicle has never been driven in inclement weather and has been pampered by a single enthusiast owner. Included are all original manuals, both factory keys, and a custom-fit car cover.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in pristine condition, it features an impeccable exterior finish and a flawlessly maintained interior that reflects a standard of care rarely seen in the pre-owned market. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering the discerning driver an experience indistinguishable from new. This is an acquisition for those who demand uncompromising quality and unrivaled presentation.
